creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
This patch updates audio/libgpod to latest version 0.5.2:

http://norway.ath.cx/freebsd/libgpod_0_5_2.diff

Fix: 

-------29GDrIIZYSjcLFLZ4s0k4g2qK6ENY1hdrcQPWoGYieutDFpe
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN audio/libgpod.bak/Makefile audio/libgpod/Makefile
--- audio/libgpod.bak/Makefile	Fri Jul 13 18:08:15 2007
+++ audio/libgpod/Makefile	Fri Jul 13 18:09:17 2007
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	libgpod
-PORTVERSION=	0.4.2
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.5.2
 CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	gtkpod
diff -ruN audio/libgpod.bak/distinfo audio/libgpod/distinfo
--- audio/libgpod.bak/distinfo	Fri Jul 13 18:08:15 2007
+++ audio/libgpod/distinfo	Fri Jul 13 18:09:27 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (libgpod-0.4.2.tar.gz) = c3c031dc6f1f6eff422598c84f2621bd
-SHA256 (libgpod-0.4.2.tar.gz) = d5b6c9047cd45b949b39f857527f46d2dd9faf8bcb5528b7b7666eedcdb95e5c
-SIZE (libgpod-0.4.2.tar.gz) = 768720
+MD5 (libgpod-0.5.2.tar.gz) = e4f8d2a7be9512268267bfbe712fe9be
+SHA256 (libgpod-0.5.2.tar.gz) = f2a4396dd92ad557a538ffce892020da6ed967454f1027314d270e21c56ec79b
+SIZE (libgpod-0.5.2.tar.gz) = 791704
diff -ruN audio/libgpod.bak/pkg-plist audio/libgpod/pkg-plist
--- audio/libgpod.bak/pkg-plist	Fri Jul 13 18:08:15 2007
+++ audio/libgpod/pkg-plist	Fri Jul 13 18:23:32 2007
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 include/gpod-1.0/gpod/itdb.h
 @dirrm include/gpod-1.0/gpod
 @dirrm include/gpod-1.0
-lib/libgpod.so.1
+lib/libgpod.so.2
 lib/libgpod.so
 lib/libgpod.la
 lib/libgpod.a
